narrative:
Ames Township (precinct in Athens County) has 739 registered voters, with 48.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 35.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.5 percentage points.
